## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behaviour
- [ ] ADR updated or new ADR created (if architectural decision)
- [ ] Lockfiles regenerated (`pnpm install`, `uv sync`)
- [ ] Codegen re-run if schema changed (`pnpm codegen`)
- [ ] Cross-platform considered (path handling, encoding, subprocess semantics)
- [ ] CI passes on both Linux and Windows
